caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, sits in a studio setting. She is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand, looking slightly to her left with a subtle smile. Behind her is a black wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text. To her right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text below stating "Lr 11 Logo Glass". Another logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST" is visible on the screen behind her. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains stationary with a consistent facial expression, and the surrounding environment, including the equipment and text, stays unchanged, indicating a still or very slow-moving shot.
